summary: Phase 57 testing completed - Validation API trimmed to 6 checks (recipients + routing_mode removed), radio canvas label removal verified via code review. All 7 backend API tests passed.

warnings.issue: Comment on line 9 mentions '8 checks' but code dynamically uses backend response - stale comment only, not a bug

critical_code_review_comments: 1. validation_service.py: CHECK_DEFINITIONS trimmed to 6 entries (lines 17-26), _check_recipients and _check_routing_mode methods removed (Phase 57 comments at lines 21-22, 65-67, 160-162)
2. MultiPageVisualBuilder.js: Radio canvas render shows circle only, no label text (lines 1072-1083). Tooltip shows optionLabel on hover.
3. InteractiveDocumentViewer.js: Radio signing render shows circle only, no visible label (lines 644-675). aria-label for accessibility.
4. package_public_routes.py: Radio PDF embed draws circle only, no label (lines 774-784, Phase 56 comment confirms).
5. PublicDocumentViewEnhanced.js: pdf-lib radio embed draws circle only, no label (lines 532-534, Phase 56 comment confirms).
6. ValidationPanel.js: Dynamically renders backend checks array - works with any check count (6, 8, etc.)

success_rate.frontend: Code review verified - UI testing blocked by slow page load

context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 57 validation API verified via pytest. Radio canvas/signing/PDF label removal verified via code review. UI testing was blocked by slow page load times (setup page stuck on 'Loading setup...'). The validation API correctly returns 6 checks with categories {Template, CRM, Fields} and no recipient/routing mentions. Page sync (Phase 56) was already verified in iteration_15.
